name: tabula-mcp
description: Let Claude work with people in shared Tabula.md Markdown workspaces.
long_description: Tabula.md MCP lets Claude create private Markdown drafts, open encrypted copy links, and join live sessions where people and Claude continue in the same files. Local working drafts stay on this machine. Complete #room and #json URLs are bearer secrets; the Tabula Room relay and Tabula JSON store receive encrypted data only.

tools.name: tabula_create_document
tools.description: Create a Markdown document in the current writable Tabula session, or a private local draft when Claude is not connected to a session.

tools.name: tabula_update_document
tools.description: Update the latest or selected private Tabula Markdown draft.

tools.name: tabula_list_documents
tools.description: List local Tabula.md document checkpoints saved by this MCP server.

tools.name: tabula_open_document
tools.description: Open the latest or selected local Tabula.md document checkpoint in a compact Tabula handoff card.

tools.name: tabula_read_me
tools.description: Read Tabula.md MCP workflow guidance and security boundaries.

tools.name: tabula_share_document
tools.description: Export a local Tabula.md document as an encrypted JSON snapshot link.

tools.name: tabula_create_workspace
tools.description: Create a private Tabula.md Markdown workspace from inline files.

tools.name: tabula_import_markdown_workspace
tools.description: Import Markdown files from inline content or an allowed directory on this device.

tools.name: tabula_share_workspace
tools.description: Create an encrypted Tabula.md copy link from a private workspace.

tools.name: tabula_create_workspace_room
tools.description: Start an encrypted Tabula.md live session from a private workspace.

tools.name: tabula_connect_room
tools.description: Join an encrypted Tabula.md live-session invite so Claude and people can work in the same files.

tools.name: tabula_list_sessions
tools.description: List Tabula.md live sessions connected in this local MCP process.

tools.name: tabula_read_workspace
tools.description: Read workspace metadata from a live session or private MCP workspace.

tools.name: tabula_read_workspace_document
tools.description: Read one Markdown document from a live session or private MCP workspace.

tools.name: tabula_read_workspace_context
tools.description: Read bounded Markdown excerpts from selected workspace documents.

tools.name: tabula_apply_workspace_changes
tools.description: Apply hash-guarded document changes to a connected Tabula.md live session.

tools.name: tabula_room_status
tools.description: Inspect connection state, collaborators, hashes, and write mode.

tools.name: tabula_open_room_view
tools.description: Open a compact handoff card for a connected live session, then continue in Tabula.md.

tools.name: tabula_set_presence
tools.description: Show Claude's current document or selection to live-session collaborators.

tools.name: tabula_wait_for_changes
tools.description: Wait for live-session documents to change and return their latest hash summaries.

tools.name: tabula_disconnect_room
tools.description: Disconnect this local MCP process from a Tabula.md live session.
